title: Wrapping title of column
excerpt: Some of my columns I would like to make smaller, however when I do, I am unable to read the entire column title, is there a way to have the column title wrap around?  Where the 2nd word of the column title is directly un…

posts.author: Terrie (Terrie Schwerin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Some of my columns I would like to make smaller, however when I do, I am unable to read the entire column title, is there a way to have the column title wrap around? Where the 2nd word of the column title is directly under the first word.

Hope that makes sense.
Thanks a bunch!
Terrie

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Terrie:

is there a way to have the column title wrap around?

@Terrie Unfortunately not available yet. I have the same issue. Would love to see Excel-style text wrapping.

Feel free to add your vote to similar previous feature requests:

Wrap text in column headings and/or cells Feature requests
Is there an option to have column heading and/or cell contents wrap in their cells?
